zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Dennys於1437年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆時，他的父親Maurice Dennys28歲，母親Katherine Stradling14歲。他於大約1457年與Fiennes在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他去世於1503年9月1日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Dennys于1437年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆时，他的父亲Maurice Dennys28岁，母亲Katherine Stradling14岁。他于大约1457年与Fiennes在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他去世于1503年9月1日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾奧爾維斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dennys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Dennys was born in 1437, in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Maurice Dennys, was 28 and his mother, Katherine Stradling, was 14. He married Fiennes about 1457, in Gloucestershire, England. He died on 1 September 1503, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Dennys est né en 1437, à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maurice Dennys, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Katherine Stradling, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Fiennes environ 1457, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1503, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Olveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Dennys 1437 in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice Dennys 28 und seine Mutter Katherine Stradling 14. Er hat um 1457 in Gloucestershire, England Fiennes geheiratet. Er starb am 1. September 1503 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Olveston, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Dennys è nato il nel 1437 nel Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Maurice Dennys, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Stradling, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Fiennes circa 1457, nel Gloucestershire, England. Morì il 1 settembre 1503, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Olveston, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Dennysが1437年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムで生まれた時，父Maurice Dennysは28歳，母Katherine Stradlingは14歳であった。約1457年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでFiennesと結婚した。彼は1503年9月1日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアオルベストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Dennys(이)가 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice Dennys(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Stradling(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1457년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1503년 9월 1일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 베스턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England: Dyrham, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Dennys nasceu em 1437, em Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maurice Dennys, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Stradling, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Fiennes aproximadamente 1457, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1503, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Dennys родился в 1437 г. в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Maurice Dennys было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Stradling, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Fiennes около 1457 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер 1 сентября 1503 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности олвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Dennys nació en 1437, en Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Maurice Dennys, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Katherine Stradling, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Fiennes aproximadamente 1457, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1503, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Olveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
